Kari Runner

₹ 4,299

The Kari Runner features an intricate jaal border in antique silver zari, delicately embroidered over a rich black velvet base. Twin bird motifs symbolize harmony and grace, while handcrafted zari tassels add a refined finishing touch. A statement of understated luxury, designed to elevate sophisticated table settings.

Perfect For:
• Dining rooms with warm, earthy palettes    • Festive seasonal decor
